title: Compile sub-national migration flow data
outcome: District-level migration-flow dataset with comparability documentation.
validation_method: Replicator confirms data compilation and comparability.
done_condition: Migration dataset with source documentation and replication.

title: Correlate environmental change with migration flows
outcome: Correlation analysis with explicit non-causal caveats.
validation_method: Replicator reruns with alternative environmental indicators and confirms correlation robustness.
done_condition: Correlation includes economic controls, non-causal caveats, and replication.

title: Red-team misuse of climate migration claims
Check whether outputs match urban-planning decision needs
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, misuse risk, replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases.
